tagline: June 12, 2026 The AI Runtime CLI ( air ) is now in [Beta](/aws/en/release notes/release types).
what_it_does: June 12, 2026 The AI Runtime CLI ( air ) is now in [Beta](/aws/en/release notes/release types). Use the air command line interface to submit and manage distributed training workloads on AI Runtime serverless GPU compute from your local machine, without opening a notebook.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
